name: AWS Credential Discovery to Backup Gateway Access

steps.discovery_hint: Contains AWS access keys used to interact with cloud services
Script uses AWS CLI to sync backups to s3://backup-s3-gateway
Internal IP for backup-s3-gateway reachable with AWS credentials

name: Container Escape via Docker Socket and Registry Credentials

steps.discovery_hint: Presence of docker.sock indicates the container is privileged or host-mounted socket is exposed
Contains auth tokens to private Docker registries
Daemon configuration showing docker API exposed on TCP port, potentially allowing remote control

name: CI/CD Pipeline Token to Kubernetes Cluster Access

steps.discovery_hint: CI/CD pipeline config contains a GitLab token for pipeline operations
Kubernetes config with a service account token allowing access to db-standby cluster
Internal IP for db-standby, reachable from db-primary with kubectl config
